name: Corrosive Cloud
description: A Vladof area grenade that bursts into a lingering corrosive cloud, damaging anything caught inside for several seconds. Even enemies that resist or ignore corrosive damage still take damage from the cloud itself, though they will not suffer the usual corrosive damage-over-time effect.
notes: The cloud is more dangerous than it looks. Walking through it can strip your health quickly or kill you outright.
